title: TMD’s keyless bike lock is a $280 solution to a $60 problem
summary: TMD's Chain Lock is a $280 smart bike lock that combines Bluetooth proximity sensors, motion alarms, and premium materials like Dyneema and Kevlar. While smart bike locks have historically struggled to justify their cost, TMD's ART-2 insurance certification and durable construction make it a compelling option for expensive e-bike owners.
content:
A $280 bike lock on a $10,000 e-bike.	

I've seen lots of so-called "smart" bike locks over the years, but none so far could justify the added cost. A newcomer that got its start securing ATMs for banks is trying to change that. There's nothing wholly unique about the TMD Chain Lock, but the combination of materials, performance, and insurance-friendly ART-2 certification makes it worth considering.
TMD's first bicycle lock combines a Bluetooth proximity sensor and motion alarm with a slender core of hardened steel chain wrapped in a soft and lightweight sleeve of high performance Dyneema and Kevlar fibers. That makes this lock tough, yet flexible enough to conveniently wrap arou …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: TMD的无钥匙自行车锁是一个280美元的解决方案，用来解决60美元的问题
zh.summary: TMD的链式锁是一款280美元的智能自行车锁，结合了蓝牙近距离传感器、运动警报和Dyneema与Kevlar等高级材料。虽然智能自行车锁历来难以证明成本的合理性，但TMD的ART-2保险认证和耐用的构造使其成为昂贵电动自行车所有者的引人注目的选择。

title: Indian payments chief thinks AI will be heavily involved in next era of digital payment growth
summary: India's chief payments official Dilip Asbe believes artificial intelligence will play a significant role in the next phase of digital payment growth. He suggests that newer UPI applications could become more competitive by adopting viable commercial models powered by AI.
content: Dilip Asbe said that newer UPI apps could be more competitive with a viable commercial model

zh.title: 印度支付主管认为人工智能将在数字支付增长的下一个时代中起重要作用
zh.summary: 印度首席支付官员Dilip Asbe认为人工智能将在数字支付增长的下一阶段发挥重要作用。他建议，较新的UPI应用程序可以通过采用由人工智能驱动的可行商业模式来变得更具竞争力。
